records.question: What community areas have crimes linked to wards with a city hall office phone number exactly 312.744.3062?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT community_area.community_area_no FROM community_area
JOIN crime ON community_area.community_area_no = crime.community_area_no
JOIN ward ON crime.ward_no = ward.ward_no
WHERE ward.city_hall_office_phone = '312.744.3062'
records.pred_sql:
SELECT DISTINCT ca.community_area_no
FROM Community_Area ca
INNER JOIN Crime c ON ca.community_area_no = c.community_area_no
INNER JOIN Ward w ON c.ward_no = w.ward_no
WHERE w.city_hall_office_phone = '312.744.3062'

records.question: Which community areas have crimes at beat 621 or higher, with case number JB486467 on 078XX S SANGAMON ST at longitude -87.64771366 that occurred on 10/23/2018 0:25, involving property crimes in an apartment where no arrest was made?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT community_area.community_area_no FROM community_area
JOIN crime ON community_area.community_area_no = crime.community_area_no
JOIN fbi_code ON crime.fbi_code_no = fbi_code.fbi_code_no
WHERE crime.beat >= 621 AND crime.block = '078XX S SANGAMON ST' AND crime.case_number = 'JB486467' AND crime.longitude = '-87.64771366' AND crime.date = '10/23/2018 0:25' AND fbi_code.crime_against = 'Property' AND crime.location_description = 'APARTMENT' AND crime.arrest = 'FALSE'
records.pred_sql:
SELECT DISTINCT ca.community_area_no
FROM Community_Area ca
INNER JOIN Crime c ON ca.community_area_no = c.community_area_no
INNER JOIN FBI_Code fc ON c.fbi_code_no = fc.fbi_code_no
WHERE c.beat >= 621
  AND c.block = '078XX S SANGAMON ST'
  AND c.case_number = 'JB486467'
  AND c.longitude = '-87.64771366'
  AND c.date = '10/23/2018 0:25'
  AND c.location_description = 'APARTMENT'
  AND c.arrest = 'FALSE'
  AND fc.crime_against = 'Property'

records.question: Which community areas include crimes with case number JB239539 that happened exactly at latitude 41.70567778 and longitude -87.60094436, occurred in an APARTMENT, and have a beat number of at least 512?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT community_area.community_area_no FROM community_area
JOIN crime ON community_area.community_area_no = crime.community_area_no

FROM Community_Area
INNER JOIN Crime ON community_area.community_area_no = Crime.community_area_no

  AND Crime.location_description = 'APARTMENT'
  AND Crime.beat >= 512
  AND Crime.case_number = 'JB239539'

records.question: Which community area is named Near North Side and located on the Central side?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT community_area.community_area_no FROM community_area
WHERE community_area.side = 'Central' AND community_area.community_area_name = 'Near North Side'
records.pred_sql: SELECT community_area_no FROM Community_Area WHERE side = 'Central' AND community_area_name = 'Near North Side'

records.question: Which community areas on the Central side have had crimes reported at a DEPARTMENT STORE?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT community_area.community_area_no FROM community_area
JOIN crime ON community_area.community_area_no = crime.community_area_no
WHERE crime.location_description = 'DEPARTMENT STORE' AND community_area.side = 'Central'
records.pred_sql:
SELECT DISTINCT ca.community_area_no
FROM Community_Area ca
INNER JOIN Crime c ON ca.community_area_no = c.community_area_no
WHERE ca.side = 'Central'
AND c.location_description = 'DEPARTMENT STORE'

records.question: Which community areas on the Central side are associated with wards where the alderman’s first name is Brendan, the city hall office phone is 312.744.3062, and the ward email is ward42@cityofchicago.org?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT community_area.community_area_no FROM community_area
JOIN crime ON community_area.community_area_no = crime.community_area_no
JOIN ward ON crime.ward_no = ward.ward_no
WHERE ward.city_hall_office_phone = '312.744.3062' AND community_area.side = 'Central' AND ward.alderman_first_name = 'Brendan' AND ward.ward_email = 'ward42@cityofchicago.org'
records.pred_sql:
SELECT DISTINCT ca.community_area_no
FROM Community_Area ca
JOIN Crime c ON ca.community_area_no = c.community_area_no
JOIN Ward w ON c.ward_no = w.ward_no
WHERE ca.side = 'Central'
  AND w.city_hall_office_phone = '312.744.3062'
  AND w.alderman_first_name = 'Brendan'
  AND w.ward_email = 'ward42@cityofchicago.org'

records.question: Which community areas named Austin have crimes with no arrests or domestic involvement that occurred in an apartment, have the case number JB324810, and a beat number at most 1533?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT community_area.community_area_no FROM community_area
JOIN crime ON community_area.community_area_no = crime.community_area_no
WHERE crime.arrest = 'FALSE' AND crime.domestic = 'FALSE' AND crime.location_description = 'APARTMENT' AND crime.case_number = 'JB324810' AND community_area.community_area_name = 'Austin' AND crime.beat <= 1533
records.pred_sql:
SELECT DISTINCT ca.community_area_no
FROM Community_Area ca
WHERE ca.community_area_name = 'Austin'
AND EXISTS (
    SELECT 1
    FROM Crime c
    WHERE c.community_area_no = ca.community_area_no
    AND c.arrest = 'FALSE'
    AND c.domestic = 'FALSE'
    AND c.location_description = 'APARTMENT'
    AND c.case_number = 'JB324810'
    AND c.beat <= 1533
)
